module_info.docstring: Integration tests for the full synthesis pipeline.

functions.name: _setup_project
functions.docstring: Set up a fake project directory with memory and target docs.

functions.name: test_first_run_builds_baseline
functions.docstring: First run records baseline, promotes nothing.

functions.name: test_stable_entries_promoted_after_three_runs
functions.docstring: Entries stable across 3 runs are promoted on 3rd run.

functions.name: test_volatile_entries_not_promoted
functions.docstring: Entries that change between runs are not promoted.

functions.name: test_exact_duplicates_skipped
functions.docstring: Entries already in target docs are not promoted.

functions.name: test_pruning_after_promotion
functions.docstring: Promoted entries are pruned from auto-memory.

functions.name: test_pointer_entries_excluded_from_promotion
functions.docstring: Pointer entries (file path references) are never promoted.

functions.name: test_crash_recovery_prunes_incomplete_committed_entries
functions.docstring: Startup recovery completes committed journal entries left by a crash.

functions.name: test_synthesis_with_validation_filters_stale
functions.docstring: End-to-end: entry with broken citation not promoted when validate=True.

functions.name: test_synthesis_validate_false_behaves_like_phase05
functions.docstring: Synthesis with validate=False passes stale entries through (Phase 0.5 behavior).

functions.name: test_synthesis_result_includes_validation_fields
functions.docstring: SynthesisResult always includes validated_count and stale_filtered.

functions.name: test_max_candidates_caps_promotion_count
functions.docstring: When max_candidates is set, only that many entries are promoted.

functions.name: test_max_candidates_no_cap_when_under_limit
functions.docstring: When candidates <= max_candidates, no deferral happens.

functions.name: test_max_candidates_ranks_by_snapshot_count
functions.docstring: Capping prefers entries with higher snapshot counts.

functions.name: test_max_candidates_deferred_promoted_on_next_run
functions.docstring: Deferred candidates are promoted on subsequent runs.
